requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — EN IEC 62368-1 (230 V / 50 Hz / Type C/F)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全 — EN IEC 62368-1（230V / 50Hz / C/F型插头）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全 — EN IEC 62368-1（230V / 50Hz / C/F型插頭）

summary.en: North Macedonia operates on 220–230 V AC / 50 Hz mains power with Type C and Type F plugs (Schuko compatible). Under the CE/RED and Low Voltage Directive (LVD 2014/35/EU) transposed into North Macedonian law, wireless and IoT devices with an AC mains interface must comply with EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11:2020 (Audio/Video, Information and Communication Technology Equipment — Safety Requirements). CCC certification under GB 4943.1 is not recognised. CE marking covering LVD compliance must be accompanied by a DoC referencing EN IEC 62368-1 and included in the technical file.
summary.zh: 北马其顿采用220–230V交流电/50Hz市电，使用C型和F型插头（兼容Schuko）。根据转化为北马其顿法律的CE/RED及低电压指令（LVD 2014/35/EU），具有交流电源接口的无线及物联网设备须符合EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11:2020（音视频、信息及通信技术设备——安全要求）。基于GB 4943.1的CCC认证不被认可。涵盖LVD合规的CE标志须附带引用EN IEC 62368-1的DoC，并纳入技术文件。
summary.zht: 北馬其頓採用220–230V交流電/50Hz市電，使用C型和F型插頭（兼容Schuko）。根據轉化為北馬其頓法律的CE/RED及低電壓指令（LVD 2014/35/EU），具有交流電源介面的無線及物聯網裝置須符合EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11:2020（音視頻、資訊及通訊技術設備——安全要求）。基於GB 4943.1的CCC認證不被認可。涵蓋LVD合規的CE標誌須附帶引用EN IEC 62368-1的DoC，並納入技術文件。

standards_or_laws: EU Directive 2014/53/EU (RED) — Article 3(1)(a) safety essential requirement
Law on Electronic Communications of North Macedonia (Official Gazette 39/2014 and amendments)

summary.en: In China, electrical safety for information technology and audio/video equipment is governed by GB 4943.1 (equivalent to IEC 62368-1) and enforced through mandatory CCC certification administered by CNCA. Chinese mains supply is 220 V / 50 Hz with Type A and Type I plugs; Type C/F adapters may be required for North Macedonia.
summary.zh: 在中国，信息技术及音视频设备的电气安全由GB 4943.1（等同于IEC 62368-1）规定，并通过CNCA管理的强制性CCC认证执行。中国市电为220V/50Hz，使用A型和I型插头；进入北马其顿市场可能需要C/F型转接器。
summary.zht: 在中國，資訊技術及音視頻設備的電氣安全由GB 4943.1（等同於IEC 62368-1）規定，並透過CNCA管理的強制性CCC認證執行。中國市電為220V/50Hz，使用A型和I型插頭；進入北馬其頓市場可能需要C/F型轉接器。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1-2022 (equivalent to IEC 62368-1) — IT and AV equipment safety

gap.en: CCC certification under GB 4943.1 is not accepted in North Macedonia. EN IEC 62368-1 test reports from an accredited laboratory must be produced for the CE technical file. Mains voltage is compatible (220–230 V / 50 Hz) but plug type must be Type C or F (Schuko); Chinese Type A / I plugs require hardware adaptation. DoC referencing EN IEC 62368-1 must be available to AEK on request.
gap.zh: 基于GB 4943.1的CCC认证在北马其顿不被接受。须为CE技术文件提供经认可实验室出具的EN IEC 62368-1测试报告。电源电压兼容（220–230V/50Hz），但插头须为C型或F型（Schuko）；中国A型/I型插头需进行硬件适配。引用EN IEC 62368-1的DoC须在被要求时向AEK提供。
gap.zht: 基於GB 4943.1的CCC認證在北馬其頓不被接受。須為CE技術文件提供經認可實驗室出具的EN IEC 62368-1測試報告。電源電壓兼容（220–230V/50Hz），但插頭須為C型或F型（Schuko）；中國A型/I型插頭需進行硬體適配。引用EN IEC 62368-1的DoC須在被要求時向AEK提供。

source.publisher: AEK — Agency for Electronic Communications, North Macedonia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CCC/GB 4943.1 does not satisfy North Macedonia CE/LVD requirements. EN IEC 62368-1 test reports and a CE DoC are required. Plug hardware must be adapted to Type C/F (Schuko) for the North Macedonia market.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] CCC/GB 4943.1不满足北马其顿CE/LVD要求。须提供EN IEC 62368-1测试报告和CE符合性声明。插头硬件须适配北马其顿市场的C/F型（Schuko）规格。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] CCC/GB 4943.1不滿足北馬其頓CE/LVD要求。須提供EN IEC 62368-1測試報告和CE符合性聲明。插頭硬體須適配北馬其頓市場的C/F型（Schuko）規格。
